Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff SHIRLEY MOORE, Tel No. 415-235-8051 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY MOORE'S Motion To File 3rd Amended Complaint, Ms. Moore's motion to file a third amended complaint is denied without prejudice to being re-filed. Plaintiff failed to provide sufficient notice for the motion. Code of Civil Procedure 1005 requires that the moving papers be filed at least 16 court days before the hearing. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
